creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text: Brand-new install of 9.3 from disk1 iso.  Added xorg and xfce4 via pkg install.  Added nedit via pkg install.  Nedit loads and runs fine from the command line.  Tried to create xfce4 launcher for nedit.  Everything seemed to work well except the CREATE button failed to create the launcher -- it remained blank and unqualified.
